name: google-contacts
description: Resolve people, phone numbers, organizations, and WhatsApp identities through the authenticated Google Workspace CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Resolve people and phone numbers through gws
interface.longDescription: Use Google Contacts through the authenticated Google Workspace CLI to search saved people, inspect contact fields, and resolve identities without exposing raw internal IDs unless debugging.
defaultPrompt: Search my Google Contacts with gws
Resolve this phone number with gws
Match recent WhatsApp chats to contacts with gws
